title: Spring Corridor Cleanup
summary: Join us for our annual spring cleanup along the Forest Avenue corridor. Volunteers help sweep sidewalks, plant flowers, and beautify our commercial district.
body:
Every spring, the Forest Avenue BID organizes a corridor-wide cleanup to kick off the season and make our neighborhood shine. This year we'll be sweeping sidewalks, removing litter, planting new flowers in our street planters, and touching up painted surfaces along the commercial strip.

All volunteers are welcome—no experience necessary. Gloves, bags, and supplies are provided. Coffee and light refreshments will be available at the start of the event.

Wear weather-appropriate clothing and comfortable shoes. Participants are encouraged to register in advance so we can plan supplies accordingly.
